cover:
A high-quality architectural system block diagram illustrating the "AGENTFORCE CUSTOM ACTIONS".
Overall Theme: Technical architecture map, clean flow chart, analytical, educational, modern and well-structured layout.
Background: A very clean, subtle light gray background with faint grid lines.

Header:
- At the top-center, a massive dark bold rounded header block displaying "AGENTFORCE CUSTOM ACTIONS".
- Below the title, a small subtitle: "The Builder Playbook: Apex vs Flow vs Prompt Template vs API Action".
- In the top-right corner, a small circular profile icon labeled "Bennie Joseph | Architect".

Architecture Layers (Arranged hierarchically with clear connections):
- A "Action Types" container (colored in neon blue) containing modules: "Apex Invocable Action", "Flow Action", "Prompt Template Action", "API / External Action".
- A "Atlas Reasoning Engine v2" container (colored in neon green) containing modules: "Topic Classification", "Action Selection", "Confidence Score", "Multi-Agent Routing".
- A "Execution + Audit" container (colored in grey) containing modules: "Apex Commit Layer", "Idempotency Check", "Human Escalation", "Action Log".
- A central block at the heart of the system labeled "Agentforce 2.0 Orchestrator" with a rotating arrow icon. This central node has multiple dotted directional connector lines feeding into and out of all surrounding layers.
- An "INTEGRATION LAYER" box on the upper right with modules "Salesforce API v64.0" and "Data Cloud Vector Search".
- A bottom panel labeled "ACTION DESIGN RULES" with sub-modules "Single Responsibility", "Typed Contracts", "Confidence Required", "Testable at 200 records".

Style Details: Technical blueprint style, clean rounded rectangle containers, precise dotted lines with arrowheads showing control and data flow, soft pastel color scheme (pale yellows, soft blues, light greens, and dark blues), micro vector icons inside each block, neat modern sans-serif fonts, absolutely crisp rendering, no blurred elements, zero spelling mistakes, publication-ready engineering diagram.
